option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="900.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Lecturer.MainController">
<children> <BorderPane prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="900.0">
<!-- LEFT MENU --> <left> <VBox prefWidth="180.0" spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color: #2c3e50; -fx-padding: 10;"> <children>
<Button text="Dashboard" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleDashboard"/>
<Button text="My Courses" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleCourses"/>
<Button text="Materials" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMaterials"/>
<Button text="Upload Marks" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMarks"/>
<Button text="Student Details" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleStudents"/>
<Button text="Attendance" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleAttendance"/>
<Button text="Notices" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleNotices"/>
<Button text="Timetable" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleTimetable"/>
<Button text="My Profile" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleProfile"/>
</children> </VBox> </left>
<!-- TOP HEADER --> <top> <BorderPane style="-fx-background-color: #34495e; -fx-padding: 10;"> <center> <Label text="Lecturer Dashboard" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="20"/> </font> </Label> </center>
<right> <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10"> <Label text="Welcome, Lecturer" textFill="white"/> <Button text="Logout" style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-text-fill: white;"/> </HBox> </right> </BorderPane> </top>
<!-- CENTER CONTENT --> <center> <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" style="-fx-background-color: #ecf0f1;"/> </center>
</BorderPane> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="1080.0" prefWidth="1920.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Lecturer.MainController" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0.0">
<children> <BorderPane prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="900.0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0.0">
<!-- LEFT MENU --> <left> <VBox prefWidth="180.0" spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color: #2c3e50; -fx-padding: 10;"> <children>
<Button text="Dashboard" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleDashboard"/>
<Button text="My Courses" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleCourses"/>
<Button text="Materials" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMaterials"/>
<Button text="Upload Marks" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMarks"/>
<Button text="Student Details" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleStudents"/>
<Button text="Attendance" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleAttendance"/>
<Button text="Notices" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleNotices"/>
<Button text="Timetable" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleTimetable"/>
<Button text="My Profile" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleProfile"/>
</children> </VBox> </left>
<!-- TOP HEADER --> <top> <BorderPane style="-fx-background-color: #34495e; -fx-padding: 10;"> <center> <Label text="Lecturer Dashboard" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="20"/> </font> </Label> </center>
<right> <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10"> <Label text="Welcome, Lecturer" textFill="white"/> <Button text="Logout" style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-text-fill: white;"/> </HBox> </right> </BorderPane> </top>
<!-- CENTER CONTENT --> <center> <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" style="-fx-background-color: #ecf0f1;"/> </center>
</BorderPane> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<<<<<<< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD <AnchorPane prefHeight="785.0" prefWidth="1086.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="MainFormController"> ======= <AnchorPane prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="1000.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" style="-fx-background-color:#f5f7fa;">
>>>>>>> 5f2e0ee0f087c04a484e94f2bae0bbc96ecca90f ======= <StackPane prefHeight="785.0" prefWidth="1086.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="MainFormController"> >>>>>>> afra <children>
<!-- Profile Card --> <VBox layoutX="720.0" layoutY="25.0" prefHeight="250.0" prefWidth="230.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="10">
<children> <ImageView fitHeight="120.0" fitWidth="120.0" preserveRatio="true"/> <Label text="Student Name" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="20.0"/> </font> </Label> <Label text="student@email.com" textFill="WHITE"/> <Label text="Course: ICT" textFill="WHITE"/> <Label text="Phone: 0771234567" textFill="WHITE"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Recent Notices --> <VBox layoutX="30.0" layoutY="25.0" prefHeight="250.0" prefWidth="640.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="10">
<children> <Label text="Recent Notices"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0"/> </font> </Label>
<Label text="• Semester exam timetable will be released next week"/> <Label text="• Mentor meeting on Friday at 10.00 AM"/> <Label text="• Assignment submission deadline extended to Monday"/>
<Button text="View All Notices" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Today Timetable --> <VBox layoutX="30.0" layoutY="310.0" prefHeight="260.0" prefWidth="450.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="10">
<children> <Label text="Today's Timetable"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0"/> </font> </Label>
<TableView prefHeight="190.0" prefWidth="410.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="100.0" text="Time"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="110.0" text="Course Code"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="120.0" text="Course"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="80.0" text="Type"/> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Mentor Details --> <VBox layoutX="510.0" layoutY="310.0" prefHeight="125.0" prefWidth="440.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="8">
<children> <Label text="Mentor Details"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="22.0"/> </font> </Label>
<Label text="Name: Mr. John Silva"/> <Label text="Department: ICT"/> <Label text="Email: john.silva@fot.com"/> <Label text="Contact: 0712345678"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Course Timetable / Quick Access --> <VBox layoutX="510.0" layoutY="455.0" prefHeight="115.0" prefWidth="440.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="10">
<children> <Label text="Course Timetable & Quick Access"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="22.0"/> </font> </Label>
<HBox spacing="12"> <children> <<<<<<< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD <Button mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="129.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Dashboard" textAlignment="CENTER" textFill="WHITE"> ======= <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleDashboard" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="129.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Dashboard" textAlignment="CENTER" textFill="WHITE"> >>>>>>> afra <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/dashboard.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleAttendance" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="158.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Attendance" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/attendance.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets left="3.0" right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleNotice" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="155.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Notice" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="29.0"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/notes.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleGrades" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="174.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Grades" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="26.0" fitWidth="29.0"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/grade.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="42.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleMedical" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="148.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Medical" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20.0"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/medical.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleTimetable" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="198.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Timetable" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/timetable.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> <Button fx:id="btnNotice" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleCourse" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="181.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Course" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/course.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> </children> </VBox> </left> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="54.0" prefWidth="1132.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-border-color: #122c4a; -fx-background-color: #122c4a;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="10.0" right="10.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label alignment="CENTER" contentDisplay="CENTER" prefHeight="54.0" prefWidth="929.0" style="-fx-background-color: #122c4a;" text="Welcome to FOT Managment System......" textFill="WHITE" textOverrun="CENTER_ELLIPSIS"> <font> <Font name="Castellar" size="21.0" /> </font></Label> <ImageView fitHeight="64.0" fitWidth="30.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleProfile" prefHeight="32.0" prefWidth="72.0" style="-fx-background-color: black;" text="Edit Profile" textFill="#ccd9ea"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="5.0" right="5.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <font> <Font size="7.0" /> </font> </Button> </children> </HBox> </top> <center> <AnchorPane prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <children> <VBox layoutX="640.0" layoutY="23.0" prefHeight="350.0" prefWidth="318.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="24.0"> <children> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="351.0"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="200.0" fitWidth="119.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <viewport> <Rectangle2D /> </viewport> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="120.0" top="10.0" /> </VBox.margin> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </children></VBox> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="351.0" /> <AnchorPane prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0"> <children> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" layoutX="133.0" layoutY="-5.0" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="102.0" text="Name" textFill="WHITE"> <opaqueInsets> <Insets left="10.0" top="20.0" /> </opaqueInsets> <font> <Font name="Calibri" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets left="10.0" /> </padding> </Label> </children></AnchorPane> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="100.0"> <children> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="abcsomething@gmail.com" textAlignment="CENTER" textFill="WHITE"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> </children></VBox> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="Course: ICT" textFill="WHITE"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="ContactNo: 0775657777" textFill="#fff8f8"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> </children> <opaqueInsets> <Insets /> </opaqueInsets> </VBox> <VBox layoutX="29.0" layoutY="431.0" prefHeight="258.0" prefWidth="322.0"> <children> <Label text="Today's TimeTable"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="80.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> <font> <Font size="22.0" /> </font> </Label> <TableView prefHeight="193.0" prefWidth="317.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Time" /> <TableColumn minWidth="0.0" prefWidth="0.0" text="C2" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="88.79991912841797" text="Course Code" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="93.60003662109375" text="Course" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="63.20001220703125" text="Type" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <TextField floatText="\@Faculty of Technology,Universuty of ruhuna" layoutX="238.0" layoutY="689.0" maxLength="20" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="530.0" /> <VBox layoutX="54.0" layoutY="56.0" prefHeight="294.0" prefWidth="426.0"> <children> <Label text="RecentNotice"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="10.0" top="15.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> <TableView prefHeight="290.0" prefWidth="326.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="103.99999237060547" text="Date" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="322.39990234375" text="Description" /> </columns> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" /> </VBox.margin> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <Button layoutX="28.0" layoutY="677.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="54.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-border-color: black;" text="View" textFill="WHITE" /> <Button layoutX="874.0" layoutY="706.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="108.0" style="-fx-background-color: black;" text="LogOut" textFill="WHITE" /> <ImageView fitHeight="30.0" fitWidth="61.0" layoutX="844.0" layoutY="704.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../../icon/logout.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Text layoutX="714.0" layoutY="401.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Your Mentor Details" wrappingWidth="191.67816162109375"> <font> <Font size="19.0" /> </font> </Text> </children> </AnchorPane> </center> </BorderPane> ======= <Button text="View Full Timetable" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> <Button text="My Courses" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> <Button text="Results" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
>>>>>>> 5f2e0ee0f087c04a484e94f2bae0bbc96ecca90f </children> <<<<<<< HEAD </AnchorPane> ======= </StackPane> >>>>>>> afra

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<ScrollPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: #f5f7fa;"> <content> <VBox spacing="20" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-background-color: #f5f7fa;"> <children> <!-- Header Section --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;"> <children> <!-- Profile Card --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="80.0" fitWidth="80.0" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Label text="Student Name" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="student@email.com" textFill="#cccccc" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Label text="Course: ICT" textFill="#cccccc" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Welcome Message --> <VBox spacing="10" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Welcome to Dashboard" style="-fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Good day! Here's what's happening with your courses and academic progress." wrapText="true"/> </children> </VBox>
<Button text="Edit Profile" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 10 20 10 20;"/> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Quick Stats Row --> <HBox spacing="15"> <children> <!-- Attendance --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Attendance" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="85%" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- GPA --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #2ecc71; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Current GPA" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="3.75" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Courses --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #f39c12; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Registered Courses" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="6" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Assignments --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Due Assignments" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="3" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Content Row 1: Notices and Timetable --> <HBox spacing="15"> <children> <!-- Recent Notices --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="12" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Recent Notices" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <Label text="• Semester exam timetable will be released next week" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Label text="• Mentor meeting on Friday at 10.00 AM" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Label text="• Assignment submission deadline extended to Monday" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Label text="• New course materials uploaded in Learning Portal" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Button text="View All Notices" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 15 8 15;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Today's Timetable --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="12" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Today's Timetable" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <TableView prefHeight="120.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="80.0" text="Time"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="100.0" text="Course Code"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="130.0" text="Course Name"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="70.0" text="Type"/> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Content Row 2: Mentor and Quick Access --> <HBox spacing="15"> <children> <!-- Mentor Details --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="10" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Mentor Details" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <Label text="Dr. John Silva" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Department: ICT"/> <Label text="Email: john.silva@fot.com"/> <Label text="Phone: 0712345678"/> <Label text="Office Hours: Mon-Fri, 2:00-4:00 PM" style="-fx-text-fill: #666666;"/> <Button text="Schedule Meeting" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 15 8 15; -fx-margin-top: 10;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Quick Access Buttons --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="15" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Quick Access" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <HBox spacing="10"> <children> <Button text="Attendance" style="-fx-background-color: #2ecc71; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Button text="Notice" style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Button text="Grades" style="-fx-background-color: #f39c12; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> </children> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10"> <children> <Button text="Medical" style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Button text="Timetable" style="-fx-background-color: #9b59b6; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
</children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <<<<<<< HEAD ======= <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> >>>>>>> afra <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?> <<<<<<< HEAD
<BorderPane prefHeight="786.0" prefWidth="1366.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Student.StudentController" style="-fx-background-color: #f4f6f8;">
<top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="70.0" spacing="12.0" style="-fx-background-color: #122c4a; -fx-padding: 10 18 10 18;"> <children>
<Region prefWidth="30.0" />
<Label text="WELCOME TO FOT MANAGEMENT SYSTEM......" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="Times New Roman Bold" size="24.0"/> </font> </Label>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Button text="Edit Profile" prefHeight="35.0" prefWidth="95.0" style="-fx-background-color: black; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6;"/> </children> </HBox> </top>
<left> <VBox prefWidth="180.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-background-color: #031f45; -fx-padding: 28 12 20 18;"> <children>
<Button text="Dashboard" onAction="#handleDashboard" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/>
<Button text="Attendance" onAction="#handleAttendance" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/>
<Button text="Notice" onAction="#handleNotice" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/>
<Button text="Grades" onAction="#handleGrades" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/>
<Button text="Timetable" onAction="#handleTimetable" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<Button text="LogOut" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="38.0" style="-fx-background-color: black; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-font-size: 14px;"/> </children> </VBox> </left>
<center> <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" style="-fx-background-color: #f4f6f8; -fx-padding: 18;"/> </center>
<bottom> <HBox alignment="CENTER" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: #f4f6f8; -fx-padding: 5 0 8 0;"> <children> <Label text="@Faculty of Technology, University of Ruhuna" style="-fx-text-fill: #444; -fx-font-size: 13px;"/> </children> </HBox> </bottom>
</BorderPane> ======= <?import javafx.scene.text.Text?>
<StackPane prefHeight="785.0" prefWidth="1086.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="MainFormController"> <children> <BorderPane layoutX="14.0" prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0" /> <BorderPane layoutX="-2.0" layoutY="-1.0" prefHeight="786.0" prefWidth="1086.0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="-2.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="2.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="-1.0"> <left> <VBox prefHeight="786.0" prefWidth="149.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="10.0" right="10.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <children> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleDashboard" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="129.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Dashboard" textAlignment="CENTER" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/dashboard.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleAttendance" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="158.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Attendance" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/attendance.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets left="3.0" right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleNotice" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="155.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Notice" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="29.0"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/notes.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleGrades" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="174.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Grades" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="26.0" fitWidth="29.0"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/grade.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="42.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleMedical" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="148.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Medical" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20.0"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/medical.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleTimetable" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="198.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Timetable" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/timetable.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> <Button fx:id="btnNotice" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleCourse" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="181.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Course" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/course.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> </children> </VBox> </left> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="54.0" prefWidth="1132.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-border-color: #122c4a; -fx-background-color: #122c4a;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="10.0" right="10.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label alignment="CENTER" contentDisplay="CENTER" prefHeight="54.0" prefWidth="929.0" style="-fx-background-color: #122c4a;" text="Welcome to FOT Managment System......" textFill="WHITE" textOverrun="CENTER_ELLIPSIS"> <font> <Font name="Castellar" size="21.0" /> </font></Label> <ImageView fitHeight="64.0" fitWidth="30.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleProfile" prefHeight="32.0" prefWidth="72.0" style="-fx-background-color: black;" text="Edit Profile" textFill="#ccd9ea"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="5.0" right="5.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <font> <Font size="7.0" /> </font> </Button> </children> </HBox> </top> <center> <AnchorPane prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <children> <VBox layoutX="640.0" layoutY="23.0" prefHeight="350.0" prefWidth="318.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="24.0"> <children> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="351.0"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="200.0" fitWidth="119.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <viewport> <Rectangle2D /> </viewport> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="120.0" top="10.0" /> </VBox.margin> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </children></VBox> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="351.0" /> <AnchorPane prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0"> <children> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" layoutX="133.0" layoutY="-5.0" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="102.0" text="Name" textFill="WHITE"> <opaqueInsets> <Insets left="10.0" top="20.0" /> </opaqueInsets> <font> <Font name="Calibri" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets left="10.0" /> </padding> </Label> </children></AnchorPane> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="100.0"> <children> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="abcsomething@gmail.com" textAlignment="CENTER" textFill="WHITE"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> </children></VBox> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="Course: ICT" textFill="WHITE"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="ContactNo: 0775657777" textFill="#fff8f8"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> </children> <opaqueInsets> <Insets /> </opaqueInsets> </VBox> <VBox layoutX="29.0" layoutY="431.0" prefHeight="258.0" prefWidth="322.0"> <children> <Label text="Today's TimeTable"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="80.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> <font> <Font size="22.0" /> </font> </Label> <TableView prefHeight="193.0" prefWidth="317.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Time" /> <TableColumn minWidth="0.0" prefWidth="0.0" text="C2" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="88.79991912841797" text="Course Code" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="93.60003662109375" text="Course" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="63.20001220703125" text="Type" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <TextField floatText="\@Faculty of Technology,Universuty of ruhuna" layoutX="238.0" layoutY="689.0" maxLength="20" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="530.0" /> <VBox layoutX="54.0" layoutY="56.0" prefHeight="294.0" prefWidth="426.0"> <children> <Label text="RecentNotice"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="10.0" top="15.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> <TableView prefHeight="290.0" prefWidth="326.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="103.99999237060547" text="Date" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="322.39990234375" text="Description" /> </columns> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" /> </VBox.margin> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <Button layoutX="28.0" layoutY="677.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="54.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-border-color: black;" text="View" textFill="WHITE" /> <Button layoutX="874.0" layoutY="706.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="108.0" style="-fx-background-color: black;" text="LogOut" textFill="WHITE" /> <ImageView fitHeight="30.0" fitWidth="61.0" layoutX="844.0" layoutY="704.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../../icon/logout.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Text layoutX="714.0" layoutY="401.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Your Mentor Details" wrappingWidth="191.67816162109375"> <font> <Font size="19.0" /> </font> </Text> </children> </AnchorPane> </center> </BorderPane> </children> </StackPane> >>>>>>> afra

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<BorderPane prefHeight="786.0" prefWidth="1366.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Student.student_mainController" style="-fx-background-color: #f4f6f8;">
<top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="70.0" spacing="12.0" style="-fx-background-color: #122c4a; -fx-padding: 10 18 10 18;"> <children> <Region prefWidth="30.0" /> <Label text="WELCOME TO FOT MANAGEMENT SYSTEM......" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="Times New Roman Bold" size="24.0"/> </font> </Label> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Edit Profile" onAction="#handleProfile" prefHeight="35.0" prefWidth="95.0" style="-fx-background-color: black; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6;"/> </children> </HBox> </top>
<left> <VBox prefWidth="180.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-background-color: #031f45; -fx-padding: 28 12 20 18;"> <children> <Button text="Dashboard" onAction="#handleDashboard" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/> <Button text="Attendance" onAction="#handleAttendance" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/> <Button text="Notice" onAction="#handleNotice" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/> <Button text="Grades" onAction="#handleGrades" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/> <Button text="Timetable" onAction="#handleTimetable" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/> <Button text="Medical" onAction="#handleMedical" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 15px; -fx-alignment: CENTER-LEFT;"/> <Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="LogOut" prefWidth="150.0" prefHeight="38.0" style="-fx-background-color: black; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-font-size: 14px;"/> </children> </VBox> </left>
<center> <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" style="-fx-background-color: #f4f6f8; -fx-padding: 18;"/> </center>
<bottom> <HBox alignment="CENTER" prefHeight="35.0" style="-fx-background-color: #f4f6f8; -fx-padding: 5 0 8 0;"> <children> <Label text="@Faculty of Technology, University of Ruhuna" style="-fx-text-fill: #444; -fx-font-size: 13px;"/> </children> </HBox> </bottom>
</BorderPane>
